structure.heading: Executive Summary
structure.summary: Todo Master is a simple, beautiful todo list app that helps users organize their tasks across mobile and web platforms. Unlike cluttered task managers
keyPoints: **Core Value Prop:** The fastest way to manage your daily tasks

structure.heading: Mission
structure.summary: Help people clear their minds by capturing tasks instantly, organizing them effortlessly, and feeling satisfied as they complete them.

structure.heading: Persona 2: Mike - College Student
keyPoints: **Background:** Computer Science major, juggling classes and part-time job
**Pain Points:** Forgets tasks, needs quick capture between classes

structure.heading: The Problem
structure.summary: People need a quick way to capture tasks, but existing solutions are either:
keyPoints: Users resort to sticky notes or notebook apps

structure.heading: Success Metrics (KPIs)
keyPoints: Tasks created per user per day: 3+
Tasks completed per user per day: 2+

structure.heading: User Stories
keyPoints: As a new user, I want to sign up in under 30 seconds, so I can start using the app immediately
As a returning user, I want automatic login, so I don't waste time
As a user, I want to add a task with just a title, so I can capture thoughts quickly
As a user, I want to mark tasks complete with one tap, so I feel productive
As a user, I want to see my tasks in a clean list, so I'm not overwhelmed

codeBlocks.code:
1. User sees task in list
2. Tap checkbox (mobile) or click checkbox (web)
3. Satisfying animation (checkbox fill, confetti)
4. Task marked complete
5. Moves to "Completed" filter
6. Undo option appears briefly

structure.heading: Key UI Elements
keyPoints: **Floating Action Button:** Primary CTA for adding tasks
**Empty States:** Friendly illustrations when no tasks

codeBlocks.code:
-- Enable RLS on tasks table
ALTER TABLE tasks ENABLE ROW LEVEL SECURITY;

-- Policy: Users can only view their own tasks
CREATE POLICY "Users can view own tasks"
  ON tasks FOR SELECT
  USING (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Policy: Users can only insert tasks for themselves
CREATE POLICY "Users can insert own tasks"
  ON tasks FOR INSERT
  WITH CHECK (auth.uid() = user_id);

-- Policy: Users can only update their own tasks
CREATE POLICY "Users can update own tasks"
  ON tasks FOR UPDATE
  USING (au

structure.heading: Out of Scope (MVP)
structure.summary: These will be considered for Phase 2 based on user feedback.

structure.heading: Risks & Mitigation
structure.summary: **Risk:** Users find it too simple, want more features
keyPoints: **Mitigation:** Focus on nailing core experience first, gather feedback
**Mitigation:** Robust offline queue, retry logic, testing

structure.heading: Competitor Analysis
structure.summary: **Our Advantage:** Fastest task entry + beautiful design + cross-platform + free
keyPoints: **Things 3:** Great design, but iOS only, expensive
**Microsoft To Do:** Solid, but not delightful
